---
title: "progress-report-lynbrush"
author: "Lyn Brush"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"
html <- read_html(url)
tables <- html_table(html)

head(tables[[1]], 3)

data <- tables[[1]]
actual_col_names <- data[1, ]
colnames(data) <- actual_col_names
data <- data[-1, ]
head(data, 3)

data$Votes <- as.numeric(data$Votes)
data$percent_vote <- readr::parse_number(data$`%vote`)

hof_2026 <- data %>% 
  select(Name, Votes, `%vote`) %>% 
  mutate(
    yearID = 2026,
    Votes = as.numeric(Votes),
    percent_vote = readr::parse_number(`%vote`),
    inducted = ifelse(percent_vote >= 75, "Y", "N")
  )

write.csv(hof_2026, "hof_2026_lyn.csv")

```
